diff --git a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
index a1b2c3d..e5f6g7h 100644
--- a/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
+++ b/app/api/routes/pipeline.py
@@ -23,10 +23,14 @@
 
 @router.post("/run", status_code=202)
 async def start_run(
     body: PipelineRunRequest,
     background_tasks: BackgroundTasks,
 ) -> dict:
     """
     Start a new pipeline run in the background.
     """
+    # Input Validation Guard
+    if not body.diff_text or len(body.diff_text.strip()) < 10:
+        raise HTTPException(status_code=400, detail="diff_text must be at least 10 characters long.")
+        
     orchestrator = PipelineOrchestrator()
     # A temporary orchestration is needed to get the run_id before starting

scenarios.title: Trigger New Pipeline Run via API
scenarios.description: Verify that a POST request to /api/pipeline/run successfully queues a pipeline and returns a run_id.

steps.assertion: Response status is 202 and body contains 'run_id' and 'status': 'queued'

scenarios.expected_result: A 202 Accepted response is received with a valid UUID run_id.

scenarios.title: Retrieve List of Pipeline Reports
scenarios.description: Verify that the user can retrieve a summary list of all completed pipeline runs.
preconditions: At least one pipeline run has been completed and saved to the reports directory
scenarios.expected_result: The API returns a JSON array of report summaries including run_id, label, and status.

scenarios.title: Access Detailed Report for Specific Run
scenarios.description: Verify that requesting a specific run_id returns the full execution details.
preconditions: A valid report exists with ID 'test-run-123'
scenarios.expected_result: Detailed JSON report is returned for the requested run_id.

scenarios.title: Submit Pipeline Run with Invalid Payload
scenarios.description: Verify that the API rejects requests with missing mandatory fields in the PipelineRunRequest.
scenarios.expected_result: The server returns a validation error and does not queue a pipeline run.

scenarios.title: Retrieve Non-Existent Report ID
scenarios.description: Verify that the API returns a 404 error when a non-existent run_id is requested.
scenarios.expected_result: A 404 Not Found error is returned.

scenarios.title: Handle Empty Reports Directory
scenarios.description: Verify the system behavior when no reports are present on disk.
scenarios.expected_result: The API returns an empty list without error.

scenarios.title: Verify SSE Status Stream Connection
scenarios.description: Verify that a client can connect to the SSE stream to receive pipeline events.
preconditions: A pipeline run has been initiated
scenarios.expected_result: The connection is upgraded to SSE and events are streamed.

scenarios.title: Attempt Directory Traversal via Report ID
scenarios.description: Verify that the system prevents path traversal attacks when retrieving reports.
scenarios.expected_result: The API does not allow access to files outside the designated reports directory.

scenarios.title: Handle Corrupted Report JSON on Disk
scenarios.description: Verify that list_reports skips or handles invalid JSON files in the reports directory.
preconditions: A malformed .json file exists in the reports directory

steps.assertion: Response returns valid summaries and ignores the corrupted file

scenarios.expected_result: The API returns summaries for valid files and logs a warning for the malformed one.

scenarios.title: Delete Existing Report via API
scenarios.description: Verify that a DELETE request successfully removes a report from disk.
scenarios.expected_result: The report file is deleted and no longer accessible.

generated_specs.content:
import os
import pytest
from playwright.sync_api import Page, expect

BASE_URL = os.environ.get("BASE_URL", "http://localhost:8000")

# SCENARIO_ID: b873bbee-dd13-4280-8881-221977f549bd
def test_trigger_new_pipeline_run_queues_successfully(page: Page):
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest model structure
    pytest.skip("payload model 'PipelineRunRequest' not fully defined in repository context")
    
    endpoint = f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/run"
    payload = {"label": "Integration Test Run", "stages": []}
    
    response = page.request.post(endpoint, data=payload)
    expect(response).to_be_ok()  # Verifies 202 Accepted
    
    result = response.json()
    assert "run_id" in result
    assert result["status"] == "queued"

# SCENARIO_ID: f71cf783-9a81-4491-9606-5b7ee231a57b
def test_retrieve_list_of_pipeline_reports_returns_summaries(page: Page):
    page.goto(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports")
    # Browser rendering of JSON usually displays the keys as text
    report_key = page.get_by_text("run_id")
    expect(report_key).to_be_visible()

# SCENARIO_ID: af45ca24-d049-4055-87a2-f90f497d2bdb
def test_access_detailed_report_returns_execution_details(page: Page):
    run_id = "test-run-123"
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{run_id}")
    
    # Snippet 1 implies full report contains execution_results and heal_results
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    body = response.json()
    assert "execution_results" in body
    assert "heal_results" in body

# SCENARIO_ID: 1ae838a9-6e57-410c-8858-a8ffb769e8a2
def test_submit_pipeline_with_invalid_payload_returns_422(page: Page):
    # TODO: resolve PipelineRunRequest mandatory fields
    pytest.skip("payload model 'PipelineRunRequest' not fully defined in repository context")

    response = page.request.post(f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/run", data={})
    assert response.status == 422

# SCENARIO_ID: e3220959-dd62-417d-a273-5f8259609a5e
def test_retrieve_non_existent_report_returns_404(page: Page):
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/non-existent-uuid")
    assert response.status == 404

# SCENARIO_ID: dbdbf40e-491a-43ef-abd5-1df6cf9fc690
def test_handle_empty_reports_directory_returns_empty_list(page: Page):
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports")
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    assert response.json() == []

# SCENARIO_ID: ddd47b00-e578-40ec-aa1a-5d4db2acd4b8
def test_verify_sse_status_stream_connection(page: Page):
    # Use a dummy run_id to check if the connection upgrades to SSE
    test_id = "0986734f-f580-4fe4-86ad-753edffbd59b"
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/pipeline/status/{test_id}")
    
    content_type = response.headers.get("content-type", "")
    assert "text/event-stream" in content_type

# SCENARIO_ID: 721628c8-1316-4c46-b098-8811c77ea6fc
def test_attempt_directory_traversal_via_report_id(page: Page):
    # FastAPI usually handles path validation, but verifying application-level protection
    traversal_path = "../../etc/passwd"
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{traversal_path}")
    
    # Should be rejected or not found
    assert response.status in [404, 422]

# SCENARIO_ID: 4fb722ec-de52-4dca-b696-af96e216dce6
def test_handle_corrupted_report_json_on_disk(page: Page):
    # Verify system robustness by checking the list endpoint still works
    response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports")
    expect(response).to_be_ok()
    
    # System should return a list (possibly ignoring the corrupted one as per Snippet 1 logger.warning)
    assert isinstance(response.json(), list)

# SCENARIO_ID: 3e4986c3-e99e-4c7f-8018-175794130ecc
def test_delete_existing_report_via_api(page: Page):
    report_id = "delete-me-123"
    
    # Delete request
    delete_response = page.request.delete(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{report_id}")
    assert delete_response.status in [200, 204]
    
    # Verification: GET should now return 404
    get_response = page.request.get(f"{BASE_URL}/api/reports/{report_id}")
    assert get_response.status == 404
